options.content:
## Monad Criterion Benchmark Dashboard
共 **36** 个 micro-benchmark 指标，按模块分组展示。

数据来源：`cargo bench` → `prometheus_metrics.sh` → Pushgateway → Prometheus  
单位：**ms/iter**（Criterion 平均每次迭代耗时）

panels.title: 全部指标明细表（36 项）

panels.description: 完整列表，含 category / crate / benchmark 名称。Footer 行数应为 36。

targets.expr: label_replace(label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"hasher_sha256_10KB_batch_ns_per_iter|hasher_sha256_1KB_batch_ns_per_iter|hasher_blake3_10KB_batch_ns_per_iter|hasher_blake3_1KB_batch_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-crypto", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "Crypto / Hasher", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"block_ns_per_iter|vote_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-wal", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "WAL 写入", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"decode_half_full_pool_1_ns_per_iter|decode_half_full_pool_2_ns_per_iter|decode_half_full_pool_4_ns_per_iter|decode_half_full_pool_8_ns_per_iter|decode_half_full_pool_16_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-leanudp", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "LeanUDP Decode", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"encode_fragments_1_ns_per_iter|encode_fragments_2_ns_per_iter|encode_fragments_4_ns_per_iter|encode_fragments_8_ns_per_iter|encode_fragments_16_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-leanudp", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "LeanUDP Encode", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"fair_queue_push_identities_1000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_push_identities_10000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_push_identities_100000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_pop_identities_1000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_pop_identities_10000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_pop_identities_100000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_push_pop_identities_1000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_push_pop_identities_10000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_push_pop_identities_100000_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_mixed_100k_identities_10_items_each_ns_per_iter|fair_queue_skewed_100k_identities_zipf_scores_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-fair-queue", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "Fair Queue", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"session_send_init_ns_per_iter|session_handle_init_ns_per_iter|session_handle_response_ns_per_iter|session_encrypt_ns_per_iter|session_decrypt_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-wireauth", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "Wireauth 会话", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"statesync_response_encoder_ns_per_iter|statesync_response_decoder_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-executor-glue", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "Statesync RLP", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace({job="$job", __name__=~"sync_ns_per_iter|async_spans_ns_per_iter"}, "crate", "monad-tracing-timing", "__name__", ".*"), "category", "Tracing 开销", "__name__", ".*"), "benchmark", "$1", "__name__", "(.*)") / 1000000

panels.title: Benchmark 完整列表（应显示 36 行）
Benchmark 历史趋势（多次 push 后可见）
